Build a comprehensive, full-featured web and mobile application named TomSociaGrow, functioning as a Social Media Marketing (SMM) panel for boosting engagement on platforms including Facebook, TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube. The app enables users to purchase boosts such as followers, likes, comments, and views for various content types: posts, status updates, livestreams, and reels/shorts. Draw inspiration and duplicate proven features from established SMM panels like JustAnotherPanel, Crescitaly, and SMMKings, including automated order processing, drip-feed delivery, refill guarantees, mass ordering, API for resellers, and robust analytics. Ensure the app is secure, scalable, user-friendly, and optimized for SEO and performance. Develop it as a responsive web app with a companion mobile version (using progressive web app technology or native frameworks like React Native for iOS/Android compatibility), allowing seamless access across devices. Design and Branding: • Theme: Modern, vibrant growth-oriented design incorporating purple as a primary accent color (e.g., #800080 for buttons and highlights). Integrate platform-specific colors and logos: Facebook blue (#1877F2) with its ‘f’ logo, Instagram gradient (from #E1306C to #F56040) with camera logo, TikTok black/red (#000000/#EE1D52) with music note logo, YouTube red (#FF0000) with play button logo. Use these in service categories, icons, and banners for visual appeal. • UI/UX: Clean, intuitive interface with dark mode toggle. Responsive layout for desktops, tablets, and mobiles. Include high-quality placeholders for images, animations for loading/order progress, and tooltips for features. • Homepage: Eye-catching hero banner with slogan “TomSociaGrow: Explode Your Social Media Presence – Affordable, Instant Boosts for Facebook, TikTok, Instagram, YouTube”. Sections include: Why Us (real/high-quality boosts, 24/7 support, no-drop guarantees, anonymity, Naira pricing), Featured Services carousel, Step-by-Step Guide (Register, Fund Wallet, Order, Grow), Testimonials (10+ placeholder reviews with star ratings), FAQ on SMM safety and usage, and prominent CTA buttons for Sign Up/Login. User Authentication and Roles: • User Registration/Login: Secure form requiring email, username, and password. Email verification for new signups. Forgot password recovery via email. No age restrictions or verifications required. • Admin Access: Dedicated dashboard at /admin, with automatic login for the hardcoded credentials: email “johngideon179@gmail.com” and password “Ellabike” (implement secure auto-authentication; warn in code comments about production security risks). Admin can manage all aspects without a separate login form. • User Dashboard: Personalized with wallet balance, recent orders, and quick links. Sidebar navigation: Home, Services, New Order, Orders History, Fund Wallet, Support Inbox, API Docs, Affiliate, Profile, Logout. Services and Pricing (All in Nigerian Naira - ₦): • Catalog: Organized by platform (Facebook, TikTok, Instagram, YouTube) and type (Followers, Likes, Comments, Views). Sub-options for content: Posts, Status, Livestreams, Reels/Shorts. • Pricing Structure (Automated Calculation): • Followers: ₦1,100 per 1,000 (e.g., 100 followers = ₦110; scale proportionally for any quantity, min 50). • Views: ₦80 per 1,000 (e.g., 100 views = ₦8; proportional calculation). • Likes: ₦200 per 1,000 (proportional, e.g., 100 likes = ₦20). • Comments: ₦1,100 per 1,000 (proportional, e.g., 100 comments = ₦110). • Features per Service: High-quality/real engagements, estimated delivery (5-60 minutes start), min/max quantities (50-500,000), no platform-specific restrictions. Include auto-refill (30-90 day guarantee: automatic replenishment if drops occur), drip-feed (gradual delivery, e.g., 100 per hour to mimic organic growth), custom comments (user uploads list or specifies random/positive/emoji options), and speed options (normal/fast/instant). Core Functionalities: • Wallet System: Users fund via bank transfer only to account number 9067892034 (OPay, account name: John Gideon Ifebuche). Display transfer instructions prominently on Fund Wallet page. Minimum deposit ₦500. Admin manually verifies and credits balances in the admin dashboard (with upload proof option for users). Automatic deduction for orders; refunds to wallet for issues. • Order Placement: New Order page with dropdowns for platform/service/content type, target URL input (validated for correctness), quantity slider/input (real-time price calculator showing ₦ total), options for drip-feed, auto-refill, custom comments. Mass order via CSV upload (format: platform, service, link, quantity). One-click pay from wallet. No boost restrictions (e.g., no geo-targeting limits). • Order Management: Real-time tracking in Orders History: Table with ID, details, status (Pending, Processing, Completed, Partial, Refunded), progress bar, start/end counts. Email/SMS notifications for updates. Admin views/processes all orders, including manual fulfillment if needed. • Customer Support Inbox: Integrated messaging system like a ticket inbox. Users submit complaints/requests with categories (Order Issue, Payment Query, Feature Request, Other), attach screenshots. Admin replies directly from dashboard, with threaded conversations, status (Open/Resolved), and notifications. 24/7 claim with auto-responder for initial acknowledgment. • Additional Duplicated Features from Existing Panels: • API for Resellers: RESTful endpoints (e.g., /api/order with auth key) for automated boosts. Key generation in user profile. • Affiliate Program: 10-20% commission on referrals. Unique links, earnings dashboard, payout requests (manual via bank transfer). • Analytics: User-side: Personal growth stats (e.g., orders summary). Admin-side: Revenue reports, user activity, top services, exportable CSV/PDF. • Extras: Trial boosts (e.g., free 50 likes for new users), compensation policy (auto-refund for undelivered orders), multi-language (English primary, add Yoruba/Igbo for Nigeria), blog section for tips (placeholders: “How to Grow on TikTok”, SEO-optimized). • Security and Compliance: HTTPS/SSL, CAPTCHA on forms, rate limiting, data encryption. Privacy policy emphasizing anonymity (no personal data required beyond email). No logging of sensitive boost details. Backend and Technical Specs: • Stack: Frontend - React.js/Vue.js for web/mobile; Backend - Node.js/PHP with MySQL/MongoDB for database (users, orders, services, tickets). Integrate email (SMTP like SendGrid) and optional SMS (Twilio). • Boost Delivery: Simulate automated processing or integrate with external SMM APIs (e.g., via placeholders for real providers). Ensure drip-feed and refill logic via cron jobs. • Mobile App: Build as a PWA for easy installation or full native app with push notifications for order updates. • Testing and Data: Pre-populate with 50+ sample services across platforms. Include demo data for testing (e.g., dummy orders). Ensure bug-free functionality, especially wallet transactions, order calculations, and support inbox. Deploy the app ready for production, with admin auto-login enabled and all features fully implemented. Output the complete code structure, database schema, and deployment guide.

**Defining the Core Features**

I'm now concretely defining the core features for TomSociaGrow. Initial focus centers on the supported platforms: Facebook, TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube. I'm also specifying desired services, which will include followers, likes, comments, and views (for various content types). Automated order processing is a crucial feature that is necessary for the SMM panel to run.


**Expanding the Architecture**

I've been expanding on the architecture, now. I've got key components fleshed out now: drip-feed, refill guarantees, mass ordering, and API for resellers. The currency will be the Nigerian Naira (₦). I've planned out the authentication flow with secure login/registration, plus a dedicated auto-login for admins. I'm focusing on the dashboard details, specifically the wallet system (manual bank transfers), order history, support inbox, API docs, and an affiliate program. I am designing a Modern and vibrant UI/UX based on Purple #800080, responsive, with dark mode. I'm choosing React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Gemini API for any potential AI integrations (maybe for support). I am also working on the folder structure and basic files needed to get started: metadata.json, index.html, index.tsx, App.tsx, types.ts, store/context.tsx, components, pages.


**Detailing the Implementation**

I'm now detailing the implementation specifics. I've got files defined, like `services/gemini.ts` for AI helpers, and `constants.ts` for pricing/services. Theme is purple accented, platform colors, and I've designed homepage sections (Hero, Why Us, Featured, FAQ). Wallet instructions include OPay, and I've settled on the following pricing: Followers ₦1100 / 1000, Views ₦80 / 1000, Likes ₦200 / 1000, Comments ₦1100 / 1000. For the Admin area, I've got auto-login set up for `johngideon179@gmail.com` with the password `Ellabike`.

I also have a mock backend state in mind using `localStorage`! I've also set up `currentUser` in context for Authentication, and I've planned out some more component state. Orders are a list with a status, and wallet has `balance` state. I'm building out a sidebar, which will change based on user and admin role. Login will be a simple form, and I've set up new order selection logic. I'm adding payment proof upload for the wallet as well (mock).

The app enables users to purchase boosts such as followers, likes, comments, and views for various content types: posts, status updates, livestreams, and reels/shorts. Draw inspiration and duplicate proven features from established SMM panels like JustAnotherPanel, Crescitaly, and SMMKings, including automated order processing, drip-feed delivery, refill guarantees, mass ordering, API for resellers, and robust analytics. Ensure the app is secure, scalable, user-friendly, and optimized for SEO and performance. Develop it as a responsive web app with a companion mobile version (using progressive web app technology or native frameworks like React Native for iOS/Android compatibility), allowing seamless access across devices. Design and Branding: • Theme: Modern, vibrant growth-oriented design incorporating purple as a primary accent color (e.g., #800080 for buttons and highlights). Integrate platform-specific colors and logos: Facebook blue (#1877F2) with its ‘f’ logo, Instagram gradient (from #E1306C to #F56040) with camera logo, TikTok black/red (#000000/#EE1D52) with music note logo, YouTube red (#FF0000) with play button logo. Use these in service categories, icons, and banners for visual appeal. • UI/UX: Clean, intuitive interface with dark mode toggle. Responsive layout for desktops, tablets, and mobiles. Include high-quality placeholders for images, animations for loading/order progress, and tooltips for features. • Homepage: Eye-catching hero banner with slogan “TomSociaGrow: Explode Your Social Media Presence – Affordable, Instant Boosts for Facebook, TikTok, Instagram, YouTube”. Sections include: Why Us (real/high-quality boosts, 24/7 support, no-drop guarantees, anonymity, Naira pricing), Featured Services carousel, Step-by-Step Guide (Register, Fund Wallet, Order, Grow), Testimonials (10+ placeholder reviews with star ratings), FAQ on SMM safety and usage, and prominent CTA buttons for Sign Up/Login. User Authentication and Roles: • User Registration/Login: Secure form requiring email, username, and password. Email verification for new signups. Forgot password recovery via email. No age restrictions or verifications required. • Admin Access: Dedicated dashboard at /admin, with automatic login for the hardcoded credentials: email “johngideon179@gmail.com” and password “Ellabike” (implement secure auto-authentication; warn in code comments about production security risks). Admin can manage all aspects without a separate login form. • User Dashboard: Personalized with wallet balance, recent orders, and quick links. Sidebar navigation: Home, Services, New Order, Orders History, Fund Wallet, Support Inbox, API Docs, Affiliate, Profile, Logout. Services and Pricing (All in Nigerian Naira - ₦): • Catalog: Organized by platform (Facebook, TikTok, Instagram, YouTube) and type (Followers, Likes, Comments, Views). Sub-options for content: Posts, Status, Livestreams, Reels/Shorts. • Pricing Structure (Automated Calculation): • Followers: ₦1,100 per 1,000 (e.g., 100 followers = ₦110; scale proportionally for any quantity, min 50). • Views: ₦80 per 1,000 (e.g., 100 views = ₦8; proportional calculation). • Likes: ₦200 per 1,000 (proportional, e.g., 100 likes = ₦20). • Comments: ₦1,100 per 1,000 (proportional, e.g., 100 comments = ₦110). • Features per Service: High-quality/real engagements, estimated delivery (5-60 minutes start), min/max quantities (50-500,000), no platform-specific restrictions. Include auto-refill (30-90 day guarantee: automatic replenishment if drops occur), drip-feed (gradual delivery, e.g., 100 per hour to mimic organic growth), custom comments (user uploads list or specifies random/positive/emoji options), and speed options (normal/fast/instant). Core Functionalities: • Wallet System: Users fund via bank transfer only to account number 9067892034 (OPay, account name: John Gideon Ifebuche). Display transfer instructions prominently on Fund Wallet page. Minimum deposit ₦500. Admin manually verifies and credits balances in the admin dashboard (with upload proof option for users). Automatic deduction for orders; refunds to wallet for issues. • Order Placement: New Order page with dropdowns for platform/service/content type, target URL input (validated for correctness), quantity slider/input (real-time price calculator showing ₦ total), options for drip-feed, auto-refill, custom comments. Mass order via CSV upload (format: platform, service, link, quantity). One-click pay from wallet. No boost restrictions (e.g., no geo-targeting limits). • Order Management: Real-time tracking in Orders History: Table with ID, details, status (Pending, Processing, Completed, Partial, Refunded), progress bar, start/end counts. Email/SMS notifications for updates. Admin views/processes all orders, including manual fulfillment if needed. • Customer Support Inbox: Integrated messaging system like a ticket inbox. Users submit complaints/requests with categories (Order Issue, Payment Query, Feature Request, Other), attach screenshots. Admin replies directly from dashboard, with threaded conversations, status (Open/Resolved), and notifications. 24/7 claim with auto-responder for initial acknowledgment. • Additional Duplicated Features from Existing Panels: • API for Resellers: RESTful endpoints (e.g., /api/order with auth key) for automated boosts. Key generation in user profile. • Affiliate Program: 10-20% commission on referrals. Unique links, earnings dashboard, payout requests (manual via bank transfer). • Analytics: User-side: Personal growth stats (e.g., orders summary). Admin-side: Revenue reports, user activity, top services, exportable CSV/PDF. • Extras: Trial boosts (e.g., free 50 likes for new users), compensation policy (auto-refund for undelivered orders), multi-language (English primary, add Yoruba/Igbo for Nigeria), blog section for tips (placeholders: “How to Grow on TikTok”, SEO-optimized). • Security and Compliance: HTTPS/SSL, CAPTCHA on forms, rate limiting, data encryption. Privacy policy emphasizing anonymity (no personal data required beyond email). No logging of sensitive boost details. Backend and Technical Specs: • Stack: Frontend - React.js/Vue.js for web/mobile; Backend - Node.js/PHP with MySQL/MongoDB for database (users, orders, services, tickets). Integrate email (SMTP like SendGrid) and optional SMS (Twilio). • Boost Delivery: Simulate automated processing or integrate with external SMM APIs (e.g., via placeholders for real providers). Ensure drip-feed and refill logic via cron jobs. • Mobile App: Build as a PWA for easy installation or full native app with push notifications for order updates. • Testing and Data: Pre-populate with 50+ sample services across platforms. Include demo data for testing (e.g., dummy orders). Ensure bug-free functionality, especially wallet transactions, order calculations, and support inbox. Deploy the app ready for production, with admin auto-login enabled and all features fully implemented. Output the complete code structure, database schema, and deployment guide.
